title: osmanthus ilicifolius var. rotundifolius
intro: Osmanthus ilicifolius var. rotundifolius, also known as the holly-tea osmanthus, is a variety of the osmanthus ilicifolius plant, a flowering plant native to China and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, making it useful in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system, due to its adaptogenic properties. Osmanthus ilicifolius var. rotundifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
